name: General construction
description: General building work, coordination, and non-specialist repairs.

name: Painting and surface finishing
description: Painting, touch-up work, and wall or ceiling surface corrections.
example_issues_en: paint is damaged beside the window

name: Plumbing
description: Pipes, drains, water fixtures, toilets, sinks, and visible leaks.
example_issues_en: water is leaking under the sink

name: Electrical work
description: Sockets, switches, lighting, wiring, cables, and electrical safety.
example_issues_en: the ceiling light does not work

name: HVAC and ventilation
description: Ventilation terminals, airflow, heating, cooling, and HVAC adjustments.
example_issues_en: there is no airflow from the vent

name: Tiling
description: Wall and floor tiles, grout, and tile finishing.
example_issues_en: grout is missing beside the shower

name: Sealing and waterproofing
description: Silicone joints, sealants, waterproofing, thresholds, and wet-area sealing.
example_issues_en: silicone is missing around the shower
the balcony door seal is damaged

name: Doors and windows
description: Doors, windows, handles, locks, hinges, seals, and adjustments.
example_issues_en: the balcony door does not close

name: Cleaning
description: Construction cleaning, dust removal, waste removal, and final cleaning.
example_issues_en: construction dust remains in the bedroom
waste must be removed from the corridor

name: Flooring
description: Laminate, parquet, vinyl, floor surfaces, skirting boards, and floor repairs.
